title: YöL Hugs & Kisses Baby Milestone Journal Keepsake Toddler Newborn Shower Christening Gift Diary
features: Baby Milestone Journal Keepsake Toddler Newborn Shower Christening Gift Diary
description: Product Description Keepsake Journal A baby record book is a great way for parents to capture all the precious moments of their child's early life. It helps them remember special events like the child's first holiday or first Christmas. By collecting photographs and special keepsakes, parents can add more details to the book, capturing all the big and small moments that they might otherwise forget. Memory Box The box has a spacious single compartment inside, which is large enough to store precious items such as the first ultrasound picture, the hospital wristband of the baby, the first lock of hair, and congratulatory cards from loved ones. The front of the box has a cute little 3D heart and the lid features a little bunny, while the muted grey colours of the box make it suitable for both boys and girls. This box is a perfect way to preserve and store the items and memories that you want to cherish forever. Photo Album The photo album has a cute design of pastel drawings featuring a bunny, an elephant, balloons, trees, hearts, and butterflies on a white background. The album is titled "Hello Baby, Welcome to the World". It's a beautiful Baby Photo Album from Hugs & Kisses Baby Collection that can hold 252 photos, memos, and countless memories. It's perfect to cherish the most precious memories of your baby. Keepsake Journal Memory Box Photo Album Milestone Cards This set of thirty memorable moment cards is an excellent addition to any collection of baby gifts. It is a perfect way to record memories of a new born. These cards make a great gift for parents who have recently welcomed a new member into their family. Each card has space for writing the date at the top left-hand side. The set includes cards for special occasions such as 'First Christmas' and 'Today, I said my first words!' Knitted Bunny/Cat These knitted comforters are a wonderful addition to any baby's collection. They feature a soft and breathable cotton knitted fabric and are filled with polyester. You can choose from cute rabbit and cat designs. These comforters are ideal for newborns during those precious first few months. They are suitable for babies from 0+ months. The material used in making these comforters is 100% cotton, and the filling is made of polyester. Photo Frame This frame features 12 smaller-sized slots where you can place your favourite photos from each month of your baby's first year. The larger slot is reserved for a special hand and footprint, which creates a beautiful keepsake. While we can't stop your little one from growing, we can definitely assist you in creating a unique and special keepsake to remember their first year. Milestone Cards Knitted Bunny/Cat Photo Frame
